max_char_chunk_per_sentence.description: The maximum number of characters per chunk when combining the words into sentences. - based on ChatGPT eval 20-130 chars

max_char_chunk.description: The maximum number of characters per chunk when combining sentences into chunks.

openai_model.description: The OpenAI model to be used.

window_size_for_timesync.description: The window size for time synchronization.

delay_between_words_for_new_sentence_chu.description: Delay between words for new sentence chunk.

time_delta_max_for_timesync.description: Maximum time delta for time synchronization.

deepl_delay.description: Delay between requests to Deepl API.

translation_provider.description: Translation provider to use. Options: 'deepl' or 'openai'.

tts_api.description: Options: 'elevenlabs', 'openai'. TTS API to be used.

whisper_chunk_length_sec.description: Length in seconds of chunks which we split audio for processing by whisper api.

whisper_silence_split.description: Should aduio be splitted by silence between speech [true] or just by whisper_chunk_length_sec [false].

whisper_silence_sec.description: How long should be silence between speech to be considered for split for whisper chunks.

whisper_api.description: Use whisper API. If false, use whisper locally.

whisper_default_model_local.description: The model which will be used for whisper locally if not provided by the user.

whisper_api_max_size_mp3.description: Max size in MB of audio file for whisper API.

number_of_issues_to_find.description: How many issues we need to find in translation for autogenerated custom instructions pd-035-customize.py

improve_openai_model.description: OpenAI model to be used in improve stage.

use_subtitles_as_is.description: Use subtitles as is. If true, subtitles will not be converted to chunks.

openai_model_tts.description: OpenAI model to be used for TTS.

improve_output_tokens_max.description: Max tokens for model which is used to in improve stage.

improve_tokens_to_use_for_input_fraction.description: Fraction of tokens to use for input for model which is used to in improve stage.

improve_openai_temperature.description: Temperature for model which is used to in improve stage.

max_video_file_size_mb.description: Max size in MB of video file for postprocessing. If the file is larger, a preview version will be created.
